summary: Trending Topics feature for VIP Community tested and verified. All backend APIs (GET /api/vip/social/trending, GET /api/vip/social/feed with ?topic= filter) working correctly. Frontend UI displays trending topics bar with amber 'Trending' label, trending-up icon, and clickable topic pills ($BTC, $ETH, $SOL, etc.) with mention counts. Topic filter functionality working - clicking pill filters feed and shows 'Filtered by' indicator.
critical_code_review_comments: Trending endpoint correctly aggregates crypto_mentions from social posts and extracts $SYMBOL patterns from content
Default popular symbols (BNB, XRP, ADA, AVAX) properly added when not enough organic topics
Feed filter uses proper MongoDB $or query on crypto_mentions array and content regex
Frontend correctly fetches trending topics and feeds them in parallel with stories
Topic pills correctly show counts > 0 with scTrendingCount badge
Active topic state properly styled with cyan highlight (scTrendingPillActive)
Translations present for FR/EN/ES in vip.social.filterBy key
seed_data_creation: None - used existing VIP user and posts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trending Topics feature fully tested. Backend: /api/vip/social/trending returns trending crypto topics with symbol, count, display fields. /api/vip/social/feed?topic=BTC filters posts by crypto mentions. Frontend: Trending bar shows between composer and posts in Social tab. Pills are clickable to filter feed. Clear filter button (X) appears when filter active. All styles use 'sc' prefix (scTrendingSection, scTrendingPill, etc.). Active pills have cyan highlight.
